hooks.command: latest=$(ls -t daily_reports/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$latest" ]; then echo "[Latest daily report: $latest]"; cat "$latest"; else echo "[No daily report yet. Consider running /daily-report]"; fi

if [ -f knowledge/INDEX.md ]; then echo "[Knowledge wiki index — load only the pages you need]"; cat knowledge/INDEX.md; else echo "[No knowledge wiki yet. Use /wiki to start accumulating distilled knowledge]"; fi
today=$(date +%Y%m%d); report="daily_reports/${today}.md"; if [ -f "$report" ]; then echo "" >> "$report"; echo "<!-- session ended: $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z) -->" >> "$report"; fi
